description: Operation Matterhorn – Strike on Yawata steel works from Xinjin China.
Long-range escort to Tokyo from Iwo Jima.
Operation Meetinghouse – Tokyo low-level firebombing raid.
Osaka defense patrol from Itami base.
Primary target Hiroshima. Visual release of 'Little Boy' at 08:15 local. Return flight across Iwo Jima.
Nagasaki strike after Kokura was obscured. Landed at Okinawa Kadena due to fuel shortage.
